title: SkyDeck.ai Security
description: Create, Curate, and Control with SkyDeck.ai. We are SOC 2 Type 2 Certificated.
lede: SkyDeck AI Inc. prioritizes security with SOC 2 Type 1 & 2 and CASA Tier 2 certifications for our SkyDeck.ai Platform and Rememberizer service.
html:
Systems and Organization Controls

SOC 2 TYPE 2 CERTIFIED

The SOC 2 framework includes 64 distinct requirements organized under five Trust Services Criteria (TSC), which provide the basis for assessing an organization's controls. These criteria are divided into Security Controls and Privacy Controls.

SkyDeck AI Inc. has been SOC 2 Type 1 certified since January 2024 and achieved SOC 2 Type 2 certification in June 2024.

Learn more

Cloud Application Security Assessment

CASA Tier 2 certificated

The Tier 2 CASA is aligned to the OWASP Application Security Verification Standard (ASVS) v4.0. There are 134 requirements in total, with each mapped to its own set of acceptance criteria.

The Rememberizer Service has passed CASA Tier 2 Certification in April 2024.

Learn more
